title: The Return of the Data Scientist | Interrupt 26
description_preview:
Shreya Shankar and Hamel Husain have taught evals to over 4,500 people across dozens of companies, and they keep seeing the same mistakes. This talk walks through five of the most common pitfalls and how thinking like a data scientist fixes them.

At Interrupt, the agent conference by LangChain, they covered:
• Why generic metrics like "helpfulness" and "hallucination" are too ambiguous to use off the shelf
• How to treat LLM judges as imperfect classifiers with train/dev/test splits
• Why synth

title: What LLMs and Biology Have in Common | Max Agency
description_preview:
Software engineers are trained to think deterministically — write code, predict the output, debug the gap. But that mindset breaks down with LLMs. And according to Nicholas Larus-Stone, the people who are best at working with them are starting to look a lot more like biologists than engineers.

The analogy he draws is sharp: biologists have spent over a century probing systems they don't fully understand, running experiments, watching how things respond, and building knowledge iteratively. Inter

title: Analyze earnings and update your investment thesis with Codex
description_preview:
See how the public equity investing plugin for Codex turns a company’s latest quarter into a post-earnings analysis. 

Using connected data from sources like Quartr, Daloopa, and S&P Global, Codex evaluates a company’s growth drivers, guidance, margin trends, and quality of print. It then packages the analysis into bull, base, and bear cases, a monitoring checklist, and can create detailed Excel workbooks or presentation-ready PowerPoint decks.

title: Debug web apps with browser use in Codex
description_preview:
Codex can now use the Chrome DevTools Protocol (CDP) in Browser Use to inspect console logs, runtime errors, local storage, applied styling, network traffic, and performance profiles while working on web applications.

In this demo, Codex investigates a slow chat app by profiling interactions and inspecting network requests, then fixes the issues and supports the changes with clear measurements.

description_preview:

Don’t sleep on Codex for creatives. It understands brand books, style guides, fonts, composition and can create ship-worthy full funnel campaign visuals in a few hours.

title: Build sales account strategies and outreach with Codex
description_preview:
See how the sales plugin for Codex helps sales teams move from account context to seller-ready work.

In this demo, Codex prioritizes prospect accounts from Salesforce, creates a prospecting plan, drafts account-specific outreach, and sets up a morning cadence to keep the plan updated when account status changes.

title: Creating black hole simulations with Codex
description_preview:
To learn more about black holes, computational astrophysicist Chi-kwan “CK” Chan is working to create the first moving image of one. CK creates simulations and compares them to observational data gathered at telescopes – but these don’t always match up.
